name: Stonehedge Indoor Golf
about: Stonehedge Indoor Golf in Rutland, VT is a premier multi-sport entertainment venue featuring high-tech indoor golf simulators and a wide array of other activities. The facility uses advanced technology, including aboutGOLF simulation systems with 18-foot screens, to offer an immersive golfing experience that replicates world-famous courses. It operates on a flat hourly rental basis, with no per-player fees, making it an affordable option for groups. Beyond golf, Stonehedge functions as a one-stop destination with a bar and grill, VR gaming, and various other games, suitable for social gatherings, corporate events, and casual practice.
why_golfers_like_it: Immersive 18-foot aboutGOLF simulator screens with highly accurate ball and club tracking
Flat hourly pricing structure with no per-player charge, allowing groups to split costs
State-of-the-art technology offering both fantasy and real-life course replicas
Free club and ball rental provided, eliminating the need for personal equipment

food_and_drink.notes: In-house bar and grill called Mulligan's offering a variety of snacks, with particular acclaim for their chicken wings and homemade appetizers like mozzarella sticks and fried pickles.
Fully stocked bar with a wide selection of craft and domestic beers, wines, and ready-to-drink cocktails. Currently developing a signature cocktail menu with Killington Distillery spirits.

simulator_hardware.notes: Six super high-definition indoor golf simulators with 18-foot screens, known for their immersive play technology and accuracy.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs and balls?
faq.answer: No, Stonehedge Indoor Golf provides golf clubs and balls free of charge to any member of your group who needs equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drink are not permitted. The venue has an in-house bar and grill called Mulligan's where you can purchase snacks and beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes depends on your group's pace and play style. The venue charges by the hour, so you can book as much time as you need to complete your desired number of holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Stonehedge is designed as a family-friendly environment. They offer activities suitable for all ages, including indoor miniature golf, and welcome children for events and casual play.
